word: H7941 - שֵׁכָר - shêkâr - shay-kawr' - Strong drink

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁכר

Transliteration: shêkâr

Phonetic: shay-kawr'

BDB Definition:

  1. strong drink, intoxicating drink, fermented or intoxicating liquor

Origin: from H7937

TWOT entry: 2388a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
